The Hitman’s Bodyguard (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $75,468,583Details
International Box Office $107,946,600
Worldwide Box Office $183,415,183
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,054,073
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,140,140
Total $18,194,213
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The world’s top protection agent is called upon to guard the life of his mortal enemy, one of the world’s most notorious hit-men. The relentless bodyguard and manipulative assassin have been on the opposite end of the bullet for years and are thrown together for 24 hours. During their adventure from England to the Hague, they encounter high-speed car chases, outlandish boat escapades and a merciless Eastern European dictator who is out for blood.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,384,504 (28.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,377 opening theaters/3,377 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $100,624,778

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 18th, 2017 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: August 18th, 2017 (Wide), released as Žudiko asmens sargybinis (Lithuania)
August 18th, 2017 (Wide), released as Belalı Tanık (Turkey)
August 18th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
August 18th, 2017 (Wide), released as Zabiják & bodyguard (Czech Republic)
August 18th, 2017 (Wide) (Slovakia)
Video Release: November 7th, 2017 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2472 (Cert #51015), 4/19/2017)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: The Hitman’s Bodguard
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Intertitle, Outtakes During Credits, Prologue
Geographical setting: Amsterdam, England, Netherlands, The Hague
Plot point: Bodyguard, Bonnie and Clyde romance, Car Chase, Corrupt Cops, Hitmen, Interpol, On a Boat, Romance, Special Ops
Social setting: Witness Protection
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Millennium Films, Cristal Pictures, East Light Film, CG Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The world’s top protection agent is called upon to guard the life of his mortal enemy, one of the world’s most notorious hit-men. The relentless bodyguard and manipulative assassin have been on the opposite end of the bullet for years and are thrown together for 24 hours. During their adventure from England to the Hague, they encounter high-speed car chases, outlandish boat escapades and a merciless Eastern European dictator who is out for blood.

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.
